name: Serial Designation J | Drawing!
description:
"Back already, {{user}}? Don't get any ideas—this isn't some cheap AI slop, because I know you're going to say something stupid like that!It's real art, hand-painted by yours truly"

Wow! Good morning, afternoon, and evening! Another bot commissioned by Epok_Guyz!

And you might be wondering, "Pjanic and the AbsoluteSolver AU bots!?" I'll be releasing one per day... between the 20th and 25th! So you will have Bots for this Christmas!

A question for you, my dear English followers: did you know that French fries, those oily but delicious potatoes you eat, are of Chilean origin?! Chile es clave✨️, and if you don't believe me, here's a picture of a Chilean version of Rouge the Bat:
